what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-assets channel, mapping an attachment id to a target image URI and noting its type and addition timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Attachment id att-150d64e2 in channel design-assets
standouts: Target URI contains spaces and parentheses
conventions: image:// URI scheme for asset location
concerns: Target URI includes unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may cause parsing/encoding issues
No title, caption, alt text, MIME type, or file size
No indication of who added the attachment
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that links attachment id att-150d64e2 to a design-assets image URI with a timestamp.
questions: What does the '(18)1' suffix in the target URI signify?
Is the URI with spaces and parentheses valid for the consuming system?
Is there a separate file for the actual image content?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record an attachment, and the file does exactly that; it matches.
intention_signals: To create a durable, queryable record associating an attachment identifier with its source image asset in the design-assets channel.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between an attachment id and its image asset location in the design-assets channel.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-150d64e2 for the design-assets channel, typed as images, pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (18)1 and added on 2026-06-22T12:26:25Z.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment so it can be retrieved and referenced by its attachment id within the design-assets channel.
